assertions.summary: The targeted bridge suite passed all 12 chronological-last output cases for VAL-OUTPUT-016, covering scenarios A-E plus within-message and multi-text-block regressions, and the command-level scenario A stdout test also passed end-to-end.
assertions.reason: The bridge tests verified the chronologically last assistant output wins across mixed send_message and assistant-text flows, including the user's reported scenario where an earlier send_message("Starting.") is followed by a final assistant summary. The command test confirmed stdout was the final assistant text (`Summary.\n`), not the earlier progress update.

toolsUsed: npx vitest run "/Users/trieloff/Developer/slicc/.yolo/droid-2/packages/webapp/tests/shell/supplemental-commands/agent-command.test.ts" -t "scenario A: writes the final assistant text \(not an earlier send_message\) to stdout" --reporter=verbose
notes: The bridge evidence file shows `12 passed | 47 skipped` for the targeted VAL-OUTPUT-016 suite in `packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-bridge.test.ts`.

The command evidence file shows the targeted `scenario A: writes the final assistant text (not an earlier send_message) to stdout` test passed with `1 passed | 60 skipped` in `packages/webapp/tests/shell/supplemental-commands/agent-command.test.ts`.
